final_sql:
WITH "user_events" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
),
"user_summary" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("event_date") AS "first_visit_date",
    MAX("event_date") AS "last_visit_date",
    MIN(CASE WHEN "transactions" > 0 THEN "event_date" END) AS "first_transaction_date"
  FROM "user_events"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"last_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "first_visit_date",
    CASE
      WHEN "first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL AND "first_transaction_date" < "last_visit_date" THEN "first_transaction_date"
      ELSE "last_visit_date"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_date"
  FROM "user_summary"
),
"mobile_last_event_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    l."fullVisitorId",
    DATEDIFF('day', l."first_visit_date", l."last_recorded_event_date") AS "days_between"
  FROM "last_event" AS l
  JOIN "user_events" AS e
    ON l."fullVisitorId" = e."fullVisitorId"
   AND l."last_recorded_event_date" = e."event_date"
  WHERE e."device_category" = 'mobile'
)
SELECT
  MAX("days_between") AS "longest_days_between"
FROM "mobile_last_event_users"

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::TEXT AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device_category"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "transactions" > 0
),
"first_transaction_ranked" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "first_transaction_date",
    "device_category",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
      ORDER BY "session_date", "visitStartTime"
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "transaction_sessions"
),
"first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "first_transaction_date",
    "device_category"
  FROM "first_transaction_ranked"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
)
SELECT
  ft."fullVisitorId"
FROM "first_transaction" AS ft
INNER JOIN "first_visit" AS fv
  ON ft."fullVisitorId" = fv."fullVisitorId"
WHERE ft."device_category" = 'mobile'
  AND ft."first_transaction_date" > fv."first_visit_date"
ORDER BY ft."fullVisitorId"

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "date",
    "totals",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "date",
    "totals",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "date",
    "totals",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "date",
    "totals",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"initial_new_users" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "initial_visit_date",
    "totals":"timeOnSite"::NUMBER AS "time_on_site"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2016-08-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-04-30')
    AND "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"qualified_initial_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "initial_new_users"
  WHERE "time_on_site" > 300
),
"subsequent_purchasers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  INNER JOIN "qualified_initial_users" AS q
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId"
  WHERE s."visitNumber" > 1
    AND s."totals":"transactions"::NUMBER > 0
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT p."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage_of_new_users"
FROM "initial_new_users" AS i
LEFT JOIN "subsequent_purchasers" AS p
  ON i."fullVisitorId" = p."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "patents_with_inventor_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."publication_number",
    YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "publication_year",
    COUNT(*) AS "inventor_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."inventor") AS "i"
  WHERE "p"."country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "p"."publication_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
  GROUP BY
    "p"."publication_number",
    YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
"period_aggregates" AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR(("publication_year" - 1960) / 5) * 5 + 1960 AS "period_start_year",
    AVG("inventor_count") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
    COUNT(*) AS "total_patent_publications"
  FROM "patents_with_inventor_counts"
  GROUP BY
    FLOOR(("publication_year" - 1960) / 5) * 5 + 1960
)
SELECT
  TO_VARCHAR("period_start_year") || '-' || TO_VARCHAR("period_start_year" + 4) AS "5_year_publication_interval",
  "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  "total_patent_publications"
FROM "period_aggregates"
ORDER BY "period_start_year" ASC
